info.name: Get nameserver history for a domain

params.name: domain
params.description: The fully qualified domain to look up.

params.name: key
params.description: API key issued in the CompleteDNS account API section.

items.docs: Returns the full history of nameserver changes and drop events for the requested domain. Response includes drop count, change count, years tracked, TLD support flag, and a chronologically ordered list of events.
